title: Second jurisdiction content pack
context: Expansion to a second jurisdiction is only appropriate after M6 is stable and the first jurisdiction is sustainably maintained. This task follows the full source-vetting + expert sign-off process from tasks 009 and 011/013, applied to a new jurisdiction. The selection criteria from task 000 apply. Adding a second jurisdiction before the first is stable or without expert sign-off is out of scope.
objective: After M6 is stable, produce a second jurisdiction content pack (source vetting, duties/ethics content) following the full process: scored jurisdiction selection, source vetting + provenance recording, content drafting, and credentialed expert sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Jurisdiction scored against the four explicit criteria from task 000; selection rationale documented
All sources vetted for reuse terms; provenance recorded per source (following task 009 process)
Duties & Roles and Ethics & Compliance content drafted and cited to primary sources
Full credentialed expert sign-off recorded before any content ships
Only started after M6 (ops runbook + maintenance rotation in place)
output: A second-jurisdiction content pack (source provenance dataset + duties/ethics content documents) fully vetted, cited, and expert-signed-off, ready to load into the Imprint layer.
